SELECT s.id, s.name, s.seller_id, u.email as user_email, u.role as user_role, v.email as vendor_email
FROM shops s

LEFT JOIN vendors v ON s.seller_id = v.id;

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "
$result = & ssh -i ''C:\\Users\\dimit\\Downloads\\ocs-marketplace-key.pem'' ubuntu@3.145.4.146 ''
WEB=/var/www/html/marketplace

# New controllers
sudo cp /tmp/SupplierMessagesController.php $WEB/app/Controllers/SupplierMessagesController.php
sudo cp /tmp/ApiSupplierMessagesController.php $WEB/app/Controllers/Api/SupplierMessagesController.php

# New views
sudo cp /tmp/supplier-new-message.php $WEB/app/Views/emails/supplier-new-message.php
sudo cp /tmp/supplier_messages.php $WEB/app/Views/supplier/messages.php
sudo cp /tmp/messages-thread.php $WEB/app/Views/admin/suppliers/messages-thread.php

# Modified files
sudo cp /tmp/EmailHelper.php $WEB/app/Helpers/EmailHelper.php
sudo cp /tmp/NotificationHelper.php $WEB/app/Helpers/NotificationHelper.php
sudo cp /tmp/admin_layout.php $WEB/app/Views/admin/layout.php
sudo cp /tmp/web.php $WEB/routes/web.php
sudo cp /tmp/supplier-layout-header.php $WEB/app/Views/supplier/layout-header.php
sudo cp /tmp/suppliers_edit.php $WEB/app/Views/admin/suppliers/edit.php
sudo cp /tmp/leads_view.php $WEB/app/Views/admin/leads/view.php

# Migration
sudo cp /tmp/setup_supplier_messages.php $WEB/database/migrations/setup_supplier_messages.php

# Permissions
sudo chown www-data:www-data $WEB/app/Controllers/SupplierMessagesController.php $WEB/app/Controllers/Api/SupplierMessagesController.php $WEB/app/Views/emails/supplier-new-message.php $WEB/app/Views/supplier/messages.php $WEB/app/Views/admin/suppliers/messages-thread.php $WEB/app/Helpers/EmailHelper.php $WEB/app/Helpers/NotificationHelper.php $WEB/app/Views/admin/layout.php $WEB/routes/web.php $WEB/app/Views/supplier/layout-header.php $WEB/app/Views/admin/suppliers/edit.php $WEB/app/Views/admin/leads/view.php $WEB/database/migrations/setup_supplier_messages.php

echo DEPLOY_DONE
'' 2>&1
Write-Output $result
")
